name: charly-coder
description: Self-contained skills + MCP wiring for the charly coder/dev images (arch-coder, debian-coder, fedora-coder, ubuntu-coder, charly-arch, check-target). Ships the charly MCP server (port 18765) for programmatic access to the running pod.

interface.longDescription: Self-contained skills + MCP wiring for the charly coder/dev images (arch-coder, debian-coder, fedora-coder, ubuntu-coder, charly-arch, check-target). Ships the charly MCP server (port 18765) for programmatic access to the running pod.
defaultPrompt: Use OpenCharly Coder for this OpenCharly task.
